title: AuditEvent
description: Protocol-owned unsigned audit event payload family carried inside SignedObjectEnvelope records. The payload binds stream continuity, trust context hashes, typed references, and optional gateway attribution without secret disclosure.

typedReference.description: Typed reference to a related signed object by canonical digest and role.

object_family.description: Machine-consumed object-family label for the referenced object.

digest.description: Canonical digest for the referenced signed object envelope.

ref_role.description: Machine-consumed relationship role for this reference.

note.description: Optional diagnostic note for operator-facing context.

scope.description: Reusable execution scope context for workspace, run, stage, and step attribution.

workspace_id.description: Workspace identifier associated with this event.

run_id.description: Run identifier associated with this event.

stage_id.description: Stage identifier associated with this event.

step_id.description: Step identifier associated with this event.

correlation.description: Reusable correlation context for sessions and operations.

session_id.description: Session identifier associated with this event.

operation_id.description: Operation identifier associated with this event.

parent_operation_id.description: Parent operation identifier associated with this event.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for audit events.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this audit event.

audit_event_type.description: Machine-consumed audit event classification value from the audit_event_type registry. Runtime enforcement must validate this value against the active audit_event_type registry.

emitter_stream_id.description: Stable emitter stream identity used for per-stream sequence and continuity checks.

seq.description: Strictly monotonic per-emitter-stream sequence number for this audit event payload.

occurred_at.description: RFC 3339 emitter timestamp for when the audited event occurred. Ledger append order remains the authoritative chronology for replay and verification.

principal.description: Principal identity for the signer or actor that emitted the audit event.

previous_event_hash.description: Digest of the previous signed AuditEvent envelope in the same emitter stream, when one exists.

active_role_manifest_hash.description: Hash of the active role manifest bound to the audited event when signer role context is applicable.

active_capability_manifest_hash.description: Hash of the active capability manifest bound to the audited event when signer capability context is applicable.

event_payload_schema_id.description: Schema identifier for the typed event payload carried by this audit event.

event_payload.description: Typed event payload whose shape is defined by event_payload_schema_id.

event_payload_hash.description: Hash of the canonical event payload bytes used for verification and receipt linkage.

subject_ref.description: Optional primary subject reference for the audited action.

cause_refs.description: Typed references to immediate causes for this event.

items.description: One typed cause reference for this audit event.

related_refs.description: Typed references to related objects associated with this event.

items.description: One typed related-object reference for this audit event.

scope.description: Reusable scope context for this event.

correlation.description: Reusable correlation context for this event.

signer_evidence_refs.description: Typed references to signed evidence objects required for signer admissibility checks.

items.description: One signer-evidence reference for this audit event.

egress_category.description: Gateway egress category associated with this event.

allowlist_ref.description: Hash reference for the allowlist input governing the gateway destination.

destination_descriptor.description: Stable non-secret descriptor for the gateway destination used during the audited event.

gateway_context.description: Optional gateway-role metadata for outbound network events.

protocol_bundle_manifest_hash.description: Hash binding for the protocol schema-bundle manifest used by the emitter when producing this event.
